summary: The week of June 28–July 5, 2026 is dominated by summer heat, post-Prime Day momentum, and the wellness 'maxxing' macro-trend confirmed by Google's own Summergeist 2026 report. Wearable neck fans and K-beauty skincare are the clearest multi-platform buy signals, appearing simultaneously on Amazon deal charts, Google Trends search spikes, and TikTok Shop affiliate top-seller lists. Dropshippers should prioritize high-visual, problem-solving products — especially personal cooling, at-home beauty tech (LED masks, IPL devices, kojic acid), and wellness sleep aids (mouth tape, sauna blankets) — as these categories are showing explosive, real-data momentum across all three channels right now.
